title: Prose field-authority (model-surface-audit.md) drifts silently and asserts DEC-45-deleted constructs
description: model-surface-audit.md is CLAUDE.md's designated field/relationship/constraint authority and is routed-to by adjacent work (the two envisioning docs, the gaps catalogue, and domain-model.md, which defers field-authority to it). It still asserts constructs DEC-45 removed: MissionArea as a live model, the mission_areas_targeted M2M, the removed >=1-mission-area promotion gate, and Plan.guiding_clauses (renamed to mvv_clauses). A hand-maintained prose field-authority drifts silently: it drifted on DEC-45, and reference-data-spec.md drifted undetected through the pre-DEC-45 Department->Division and SubjectKind->ImprovementType renames (DISC-40).

evidence.reference: asserts MissionArea as a live model
the removed >=1-mission-area promotion gate in the verbatim gate list
Plan.guiding_clauses (renamed to mvv_clauses in DEC-45 Slice 4)

impact: A future reader or subagent handed the designated field-authority trusts stale assertions over the code — a deleted model, a removed gate, an old field name — and the prose authority will silently re-drift on every future model change.
proposed_resolution: Move field/relationship/constraint authority to structured, introspection-checked JSON (see the authority-home decision draft); keep domain-model.md as prose and correct its mvv concept now; demote model-surface-audit.md to a dated snapshot / derived artifact and repoint its citers. The check that an introspection lens-validator enforces is what prevents re-drift.
